commands: perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$m=0} $m=1 if s|doc/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|src/ilbmpack/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|src/ilbmpp/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|src/acbm2ilbm/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|src/ilbm2acbm/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|tests/Makefile\s*||; END{ if(!$m){ warn "Patch failed on $ARGV\n"; exit 1 } }' configure.ac
perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$m=0} $m=1 if s|SUBDIRS = doc src tests|SUBDIRS = src|; END{ if(!$m){ warn "Patch failed on $ARGV\n"; exit 1 } }' Makefile.am
perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$m=0} $m=1 if s|SUBDIRS = libilbm ilbmpack ilbmpp acbm2ilbm ilbm2acbm|SUBDIRS = libilbm|; END{ if(!$m){ warn "Patch failed on $ARGV\n"; exit 1 } }' src/Makefile.am

perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$m=0} $m=1 if s|doc/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|src/iffjoin/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|src/iffpp/Makefile\s*||; $m=1 if s|tests/Makefile\s*||; END{ if(!$m){ warn "Patch failed on $ARGV\n"; exit 1 } }' configure.ac
perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$m=0} $m=1 if s|SUBDIRS = doc src tests|SUBDIRS = src|; END{ if(!$m){ warn "Patch failed on $ARGV\n"; exit 1 } }' Makefile.am
perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$m=0} $m=1 if s|SUBDIRS = libiff iffjoin iffpp|SUBDIRS = libiff|; END{ if(!$m){ warn "Patch failed on $ARGV\n"; exit 1 } }' src/Makefile.am
